creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
don’t visit @spain without visiting the most beautiful #plaza de espana in @seville #🇪🇸 

📍 Plaza de España is a spectacle of light & majesty, this square was designed by the great Sevillian architect Aníbal González in 1929, a plaza-palace unique in the world & has a total area of 50,000 square meters, making it undoubtedly the most imposing square in #Spain #sevilla #seville #plazadeespaña 

thanks @kkdaysg for the great esim connection for my Spain trip 💙 Use DOTZ10 for discount 

🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2 
#dotzsoh #visitspain #spaintravel
